captions.01.jpg: I installed these golden Polka-dot stickers on the walls to add some flair to the space.
captions.02.jpg: I framed up these prints of local iconic scenes and hung them on the walls to give the space a more personalized touch.

captions.01.jpg: Before — cluttered countertop area adjascent to the kitchen
captions.02.jpg: After — Bespoke bar area with luxury tile backsplash, custom floating shelves, and solid brass tipping rails. The shelves were fabricated from a solid slab of American Elm that was reclaimed from Austin Parks Department
